title: helichrysum colensoi
intro: Helichrysum colensoi, also known as New Zealand tawhairaunuku, is a perennial herb in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to New Zealand and grows in mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum colensoi include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. It is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and infections.
